response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A, reference lyrics were null. 2. JSON Usage: Completed 100% manual transcription of Hoshimachi Suisei's spoken lines and translated the on-screen text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles for the live spoken portion are tightly matched to voice onset. A visual-text subtitle is added from 00:48 onwards to reflect the persistent on-screen message.

subtitles.original: ただで見ているあなた達！
subtitles.english: Those of you watching for free!

subtitles.original: ３曲までよ、ただで見れるのは！
subtitles.english: You can only watch up to three songs for free!

subtitles.original: えーっ、ありがとう代わりにね、言ってくれて。
subtitles.english: Ah, thank you for saying that in my stead.

subtitles.original: さあ、まだまだ一緒に盛り上がりたいみんなは！
subtitles.english: Now, everyone who wants to keep hyping it up together...

subtitles.original: 概要欄から…下なのかな？
subtitles.english: ...from the description box! Is it below...

subtitles.original: 概要欄から配信サイトへレッツゴー！
subtitles.english: Go to the streaming site from the description box, let's go!

subtitles.original: 盛り上がる準備できてますか？次行っちゃっていいですか？
subtitles.english: Are you ready to get hyped? Can we go to the next one?

subtitles.original: リブートしたSUPERNOVA、全身で浴びてください！
subtitles.english: Please bathe in the rebooted SUPERNOVA with your entire body!

subtitles.original: 無料パートは終了いたしました。ご視聴ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: [On-Screen] The sneak peek part of the show has ended. Thank you for watching.
